title: Contents viii The Secession of the Khawarij from 'Ali and His Companions, and Their Subsequent Return
description: Contents viii The Secession of the Khawarij from 'Ali and His Companions, and Their Subsequent Return. Recorded under the year 37 AH (657–658 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 17.
